inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Input
inputs.description: Data to pass into the protected block.

inputs.name: error_in
inputs.label: Error Input
inputs.description: Wire an error output here to catch and re-route it.

outputs.name: try
outputs.label: Try (success)
outputs.description: Continues here when no error occurred.

outputs.name: catch
outputs.label: Catch (error)
outputs.description: Continues here when an error was caught, carrying the error message.

outputs.name: always
outputs.label: Always
outputs.description: Always continues regardless of success or failure.
